title: The Reason for the Liquidation of the Banu Sulaym and Its Consequences
description: and Its Consequences It is reported that, when the Banu Hilal came to Bugha in Dhat `Irq, and he seized those I mentioned, he went on the small pilgrimage (`umrah) of al-Muharram. He then departed for Medina. All of the Banu Hilal whom he had seized he imprisoned in his

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
